# Tako

> Tako is a data intelligence platform. The Tako MCP server lets AI agents search a knowledge base of 100K+ curated charts, get grounded answers, fetch underlying source content, and run a deep research agent.

## Documentation

- [MCP Server Setup](https://github.com/TakoData/tako-mcp): Connect to the hosted Tako MCP server
- [API Reference](https://tako.com/docs/): Full REST API documentation
- [Chart Gallery](https://tako.com/gallery): Browse example charts and visualizations
- [OpenAPI Spec](https://tako.com/openapi.yaml): Machine-readable API specification

## Quick Start

Connect your MCP client to `https://mcp.tako.com/mcp` with `Authorization: Bearer <TAKO_API_TOKEN>` (CLI/desktop), or via the server's OAuth flow (Claude.ai, ChatGPT).

## Capabilities

- Fast search over 100K+ curated charts and live data — economics, finance, demographics, sports, markets, weather — plus the live web on request (`tako_search`); the top result auto-renders as an interactive chart. Deep multi-step research is the agent (`tako_agent`).
- Get grounded, citation-backed prose answers from Tako's knowledge graph and/or the live web (`tako_answer`)
- Fetch the underlying data (CSV) or page text behind any result URL (`tako_contents`)
- Run a deep multi-step research agent for complex analytical questions (`tako_agent`)
- Check API credit balance (`get_credit_balance`)
